# hetzner-robot_traffic (Data Source)

Queries traffic statistics for an IP address over a period.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Query monthly traffic for an IP address.
data "hetzner-robot_traffic" "node" {
  ip   = "1.2.3.4"
  type = "month"
  from = "2024-01"
  to   = "2024-12"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `from` (String) Start of the period (e.g. 2024-01-01 or 2024-01-01T10)
- `ip` (String) IP address to query
- `to` (String) End of the period
- `type` (String) Aggregation type: day, month or year

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `in` (String) Incoming traffic (GB)
- `out` (String) Outgoing traffic (GB)
- `sum` (String) Total traffic (GB)
